positive.zh: Generative Agents Memory Stream 按时间序 append 观察；MemGPT archival_memory_insert(content) 写入归档；Pinecone index.upsert(vectors=[("id1", vec, {"text":...})]) serverless 持久化。
positive.en: Generative Agents Memory Stream appends observations chronologically; MemGPT archival_memory_insert(content) writes archival tier; Pinecone index.upsert(vectors=[("id1", vec, {"text":...})]) on serverless index.
positive.ja: Generative Agents Memory Stream が時系列で observation を append。MemGPT archival_memory_insert(content) が archive 層へ write。Pinecone index.upsert serverless 永続化。

counterexample.zh: 反例：OpenAI POST /v1/embeddings 返回 1536 维向量但无 store_id/namespace/key 的 put/search 接口，不能当作 MemoryStore。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: OpenAI POST /v1/embeddings returns 1536-d vectors without store_id/namespace/key put/search APIs—not a MemoryStore.
counterexample.ja: 反例：OpenAI POST /v1/embeddings が 1536 次元 vector を返すが store_id/namespace/key put/search API がなく MemoryStore にならない。

boundary.zh: MemGPT main_context（工作记忆）vs archival_memory（归档）vs recall_memory（回忆）三层边界；Generative Agents Memory Stream 不等于单次 ContextAssembly 可见输入。
boundary.en: MemGPT main_context vs archival_memory vs recall_memory tier boundary; Generative Agents Memory Stream is not one ContextAssembly visible input.
boundary.ja: MemGPT main_context vs archival_memory vs recall_memory 三層境界。Generative Agents Memory Stream は一回の ContextAssembly 可視 input ではない。

instance.zh: Qdrant client.upsert(collection_name="docs", points=[PointStruct(id=1, vector=[...], payload={"text":...})])；ChromaDB collection.add(documents=[...], ids=[...]) 命名空间化存储实例。
instance.en: Qdrant client.upsert(collection_name="docs", points=[PointStruct(...)]) ; ChromaDB collection.add(documents=[...], ids=[...]) namespaced store instance.
instance.ja: Qdrant client.upsert + ChromaDB collection.add の namespace 化 store 実例。

positive.zh: Pinecone index namespace="tenant-a" 隔离向量；Weaviate multi-tenancy collection.with_tenant("org-42")；Qdrant payload index filter 按 tenant 分区。
positive.en: Pinecone index namespace="tenant-a" isolates vectors; Weaviate multi-tenancy collection.with_tenant("org-42"); Qdrant payload filter partitions by tenant.
positive.ja: Pinecone namespace、Weaviate multi-tenancy、Qdrant payload filter による tenant 分区。

counterexample.zh: 反例：ChromaDB collection 无 metadata partition 就把所有 user 记忆混在同一 collection 且无 scope 标识。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: ChromaDB collection without metadata partition mixing all user memories without scope ID.
counterexample.ja: 反例：ChromaDB collection が metadata partition なしで全 user 記憶を混在。

boundary.zh: MemGPT core_memory block key（如 persona）vs archival_memory 全局搜索的命名边界；Generative Agents agent_id 作用域 vs 单次对话 thread。
boundary.en: MemGPT core_memory block key vs archival_memory global search namespace boundary; Generative Agents agent_id scope vs single-dialog thread.
boundary.ja: MemGPT core_memory block key と archival_memory 全局検索の namespace 境界。

instance.zh: pgvector CREATE TABLE items(tenant text, embedding vector(1536)) 按 tenant 列分区；Redis FT.CREATE idx PREFIX 1 doc: 前缀命名空间。
instance.en: pgvector CREATE TABLE items(tenant text, embedding vector(1536)) partitioned by tenant; Redis FT.CREATE idx PREFIX 1 doc: prefix namespace.
instance.ja: pgvector tenant 列分区。Redis FT.CREATE PREFIX 1 doc: namespace。

positive.zh: Pinecone index.query(vector=[...], top_k=10, filter={"category":"tech"}) serverless；Weaviate client.collections.create("Article", vectorizer_config=Configure.Vectorizer.text2vec_openai())；Qdrant client.search(collection_name="docs", query_filter=Filter(...))。
positive.en: Pinecone index.query(top_k=10, filter={"category":"tech"}) serverless; Weaviate collections.create with text2vec_openai; Qdrant client.search with query_filter.
positive.ja: Pinecone query+filter serverless。Weaviate collections.create。Qdrant search+query_filter。

counterexample.zh: 反例：把 OpenAI embedding API 响应当作 VectorDatabase，缺少 upsert/query/filter 端点与 connection_profile。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: treating OpenAI embedding API response as VectorDatabase without upsert/query/filter endpoints.
counterexample.ja: 反例：OpenAI embedding API 応答を VectorDatabase とみなし upsert/query/filter endpoint がない。

boundary.zh: VectorDatabase 托管 VectorIndex vs EmbeddingRun 生成向量的表示边界；ColBERT index 的 token-level 存储 vs dense pgvector HNSW。
boundary.en: VectorDatabase hosts VectorIndex vs EmbeddingRun generates vectors; ColBERT token-level index vs dense pgvector HNSW boundary.
boundary.ja: VectorDatabase vs EmbeddingRun 境界。ColBERT token-level vs pgvector HNSW。

instance.zh: ChromaDB client.create_collection("docs") + collection.query(query_texts=["search"], n_results=5)；pgvector CREATE EXTENSION vector; SELECT * ORDER BY embedding <=> query LIMIT 5。
instance.en: ChromaDB create_collection + query; pgvector CREATE EXTENSION vector; SELECT ORDER BY embedding <=> query LIMIT 5.
instance.ja: ChromaDB create_collection+query。pgvector <=> LIMIT 5。

positive.zh: MemGPT core_memory_append(key="persona", content="...") 追加工作记忆；archival_memory_insert(content) 写入归档；Generative Agents Memory Stream append 带 timestamp 与 importance 分数。
positive.en: MemGPT core_memory_append(key="persona", content="...") appends working memory; archival_memory_insert(content) writes archival; Generative Agents Memory Stream append with timestamp and importance score.
positive.ja: MemGPT core_memory_append + archival_memory_insert。Generative Agents Memory Stream append with timestamp+importance。

counterexample.zh: 反例：RAG 检索到的 Document 未经过 admission 检查就当作 MemoryRecord 永久写入，无 candidate_manifest_digest。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: RAG-retrieved Document persisted as MemoryRecord without admission check or candidate_manifest_digest.
counterexample.ja: 反例：RAG Document が admission 検査なしで MemoryRecord として永久 write。

boundary.zh: MemoryWrite 初次持久化 vs ContextSummary 仅当前调用可见；MemGPT main_context 自我编辑不等于 archival_memory_insert。
boundary.en: MemoryWrite initial persistence vs ContextSummary visible only for current call; MemGPT main_context self-edit is not archival_memory_insert.
boundary.ja: MemoryWrite 初回永続化 vs ContextSummary。MemGPT main_context 自己編集は archival_memory_insert ではない。

instance.zh: Redis SET memory:u-42:pref EX 86400 带 TTL 写入；Pinecone upsert id=mem-42 metadata={user_id, created_at} 向量化记忆条目。
instance.en: Redis SET memory:u-42:pref EX 86400 with TTL write; Pinecone upsert id=mem-42 metadata={user_id, created_at}.
instance.ja: Redis SET EX 86400 TTL write。Pinecone upsert metadata={user_id, created_at}。

positive.zh: MemGPT core_memory_replace(key="persona", old="...", new="...") 原地替换工作记忆块；Generative Agents 更新 Memory Stream 条目 importance 分数。
positive.en: MemGPT core_memory_replace(key="persona", old="...", new="...") replaces working-memory block; Generative Agents updates Memory Stream entry importance score.
positive.ja: MemGPT core_memory_replace。Generative Agents が Memory Stream entry importance を更新。

counterexample.zh: 反例：未保留 revision 链就把 MemoryRecord 全文覆盖，丢失 Generative Agents Memory Stream 时间序 provenance。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: full MemoryRecord overwrite without revision chain, losing Generative Agents Memory Stream temporal provenance.
counterexample.ja: 反例：revision chain なし MemoryRecord 全文上書き。

boundary.zh: MemoryUpdate 修订已有 record vs MemoryWrite 初次准入；MemGPT core_memory_replace 仅限 main_context 块。
boundary.en: MemoryUpdate revises existing record vs MemoryWrite initial admission; MemGPT core_memory_replace limited to main_context blocks.
boundary.ja: MemoryUpdate 改訂 vs MemoryWrite 初回 admission。

instance.zh: Qdrant set_payload(collection_name="mem", points=[1], payload={"text":"updated"}) 更新 payload；Weaviate collection.data.update(uuid, properties={...})。
instance.en: Qdrant set_payload updates payload; Weaviate collection.data.update(uuid, properties={...}).
instance.ja: Qdrant set_payload。Weaviate collection.data.update。

positive.zh: Generative Agents：importance 累计超过阈值触发 Reflection，LLM 生成高层洞察写回 Memory Stream；RAPTOR 递归摘要树顶层节点类似 consolidation 反思。
positive.en: Generative Agents: Reflection triggers when cumulative importance exceeds threshold; LLM generates high-level insights back to Memory Stream; RAPTOR recursive summary tree top nodes resemble consolidation reflection.
positive.ja: Generative Agents importance 累計閾値超 Reflection。RAPTOR 再帰要約 tree 顶层 node。

counterexample.zh: 反例：把单次 RAG 检索摘要当作 Reflection 但未评估 importance 累计阈值或生成独立 reflection artifact。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: treating single RAG retrieval summary as Reflection without importance threshold or distinct reflection artifact.
counterexample.ja: 反例：一回 RAG 要約を Reflection とするが importance 累計閾値評価なし。

boundary.zh: MemoryReflection 合成新洞察 vs MemoryCompaction 压缩已有内容；Generative Agents Reflection 输出仍为 Memory Stream 条目而非 ContextPackage。
boundary.en: MemoryReflection synthesizes new insights vs MemoryCompaction compresses existing content; Generative Agents Reflection output remains Memory Stream entry not ContextPackage.
boundary.ja: MemoryReflection 新 insight 合成 vs MemoryCompaction 圧縮。

instance.zh: Generative Agents reflection prompt 生成 3 high-level questions → 新 insight 条目 importance=8 写回 stream。
instance.en: Generative Agents reflection prompt generates 3 high-level questions → new insight entry importance=8 written to stream.
instance.ja: Generative Agents reflection prompt → importance=8 insight entry を stream へ write back。

positive.zh: Generative Agents 检索 score 中 recency 衰减：score=α·recency+β·importance+γ·relevance；Redis maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru 驱逐；SET key EX 3600 TTL 过期。
positive.en: Generative Agents retrieval recency decay in score=α·recency+β·importance+γ·relevance; Redis maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru eviction; SET key EX 3600 TTL expiration.
positive.ja: Generative Agents score=α·recency+β·importance+γ·relevance。Redis allkeys-lru。SET key EX 3600 TTL。

counterexample.zh: 反例：无 recency 权重或 TTL 就把全部 Memory Stream 条目等权检索，违反 Generative Agents 时间衰减设计。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: equal-weight retrieval of all Memory Stream entries without recency weight or TTL.
counterexample.ja: 反例：recency 重み/TTL なし等重検索。

boundary.zh: MemoryDecay 渐进降权 vs MemoryDelete 硬删除；Generative Agents recency 是检索分数而非存储删除。
boundary.en: MemoryDecay gradual de-weighting vs MemoryDelete hard removal; Generative Agents recency is retrieval score not storage deletion.
boundary.ja: MemoryDecay 漸進降重 vs MemoryDelete 硬削除。

instance.zh: Redis FT.SEARCH idx "*=>[KNN 10 @vec $q]" 配合 volatile-ttl 优先驱逐；Generative Agents recency=0.995^hours_since_last_access。
instance.en: Redis FT.SEARCH with volatile-ttl priority eviction; Generative Agents recency=0.995^hours_since_last_access.
instance.ja: Redis FT.SEARCH + volatile-ttl。Generative Agents recency=0.995^hours。

positive.zh: RAPTOR：文本→分块→聚类→摘要→递归构建摘要树；叶节点与摘要节点均可检索；LlamaIndex TreeIndex 从 Document 构建层级摘要索引。
positive.en: RAPTOR: text→chunk→cluster→summarize→recursive summary tree; match at leaf or summary nodes; LlamaIndex TreeIndex builds hierarchical summary index.
positive.ja: RAPTOR text→chunk→cluster→summarize→再帰 tree。LlamaIndex TreeIndex。

counterexample.zh: 反例：简单 merge 多条 MemoryRecord 但未构建 RAPTOR 式层级摘要或保留 cluster provenance。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: simple merge of MemoryRecords without RAPTOR-style hierarchical summary or cluster provenance.
counterexample.ja: 反例：RAPTOR 式階層要約/cluster provenance なし merge。

boundary.zh: MemoryConsolidation 合成新层级 vs MemoryCompaction 缩减体积；RAPTOR 摘要节点不等于原始 Chunk 替换。
boundary.en: MemoryConsolidation synthesizes new hierarchy vs MemoryCompaction reduces volume; RAPTOR summary nodes do not replace original Chunks.
boundary.ja: MemoryConsolidation 新階層 vs MemoryCompaction 体積縮小。

instance.zh: RAPTOR clustering + GPT-4 cluster summary → 递归直到 root；LlamaIndex SummaryIndex.from_documents() 扁平摘要层。
instance.en: RAPTOR clustering + GPT-4 cluster summary → recurse until root; LlamaIndex SummaryIndex.from_documents() flat summary layer.
instance.ja: RAPTOR clustering→root 再帰。LlamaIndex SummaryIndex.from_documents()。

positive.zh: RAPTOR 递归摘要将多叶节点压缩为上层 summary node；MemGPT 将 overflow main_context 内容 archival_memory_insert 后从工作区移除。
positive.en: RAPTOR recursive summarization compresses leaf nodes into upper summary nodes; MemGPT archival_memory_insert after main_context overflow then removes from working area.
positive.ja: RAPTOR 再帰要約圧縮。MemGPT main_context overflow→archival_memory_insert。

counterexample.zh: 反例：Compaction 直接删除源 MemoryRecord 且无 tombstone 或 RAPTOR 上层摘要保留。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: Compaction deletes source MemoryRecords without tombstone or RAPTOR upper-summary retention.
counterexample.ja: 反例：Compaction が source MemoryRecord 直接 delete。tombstone/RAPTOR upper summary なし。

boundary.zh: MemoryCompaction 缩减表示 vs MemoryConsolidation 增加抽象层级；Lost in the Middle 启示 compaction 后关键信息应置于 context 首尾。
boundary.en: MemoryCompaction reduces representation vs MemoryConsolidation adds abstraction; Lost in the Middle suggests post-compaction key info at context head/tail.
boundary.ja: MemoryCompaction 縮小 vs MemoryConsolidation 抽象追加。Lost in the Middle 首尾配置。

instance.zh: Claude 200K window 下 Cursor 长文件部分读取策略：只加载 relevant sections 压缩 context footprint。
instance.en: Under Claude 200K window, Cursor long-file partial-read strategy loads only relevant sections to compress context footprint.
instance.ja: Claude 200K + Cursor 長 file 部分 read で context footprint 圧縮。

positive.zh: Lewis et al. 2020 RAG：p(y|x)=Σ_z p(z|x)·p(y|x,z) 检索 z 增强生成；HyDE 先 LLM 生成假设文档再 embedding 检索；MemGPT archival_memory_search(query, page=0)。
positive.en: Lewis et al. 2020 RAG: p(y|x)=Σ_z p(z|x)·p(y|x,z) retrieves z to augment generation; HyDE generates hypothetical doc then embeds for retrieval; MemGPT archival_memory_search(query, page=0).
positive.ja: Lewis RAG p(y|x,z)。HyDE 仮説 doc embedding。MemGPT archival_memory_search(page=0)。

counterexample.zh: 反例：RetrievalRequest 携带 returned candidate IDs 或 similarity scores，违反 pre-execution 请求边界。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: RetrievalRequest carries returned candidate IDs or similarity scores, violating pre-execution request boundary.
counterexample.ja: 反例：RetrievalRequest が candidate ID/score を含み pre-execution 境界違反。

boundary.zh: Self-RAG [Retrieve] token 自适应决定是否发起检索 vs 无条件 RetrievalRequest；RAG-Sequence vs RAG-Token 变体影响请求粒度。
boundary.en: Self-RAG [Retrieve] token adaptively decides retrieval vs unconditional RetrievalRequest; RAG-Sequence vs RAG-Token variants affect request granularity.
boundary.ja: Self-RAG [Retrieve] adaptive vs 無条件 RetrievalRequest。RAG-Sequence vs RAG-Token。

instance.zh: HyDE: query→LLM hypothetical passage→embed(hypothesis)→nearest neighbor search；ChromaDB collection.query(query_texts=[q], n_results=20)。
instance.en: HyDE: query→LLM hypothetical passage→embed(hypothesis)→nearest neighbor; ChromaDB collection.query(n_results=20).
instance.ja: HyDE query→仮説 passage→embed→nearest neighbor。ChromaDB query n_results=20。

positive.zh: HyDE (Gao 2022)：LLM 生成假设文档 embedding 做 zero-shot dense retrieval；Generative Agents 用 natural-language query 检索 Memory Stream relevance 分量。
positive.en: HyDE (Gao 2022): LLM-generated hypothetical document embedding for zero-shot dense retrieval; Generative Agents uses natural-language query for Memory Stream relevance component.
positive.ja: HyDE (Gao 2022) 仮説 document embedding。Generative Agents natural-language query relevance 検索。

counterexample.zh: 反例：把 embedding 向量直接当作 RetrievalQuery 文本而未记录 query_text 与 expansion 策略。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: embedding vector used as RetrievalQuery text without query_text or expansion strategy record.
counterexample.ja: 反例：embedding vector を RetrievalQuery 文本として使用。

boundary.zh: RetrievalQuery 自然语言 vs EmbeddingVector 数值表示；HyDE 假设文档是 query expansion 中间产物而非最终 query。
boundary.en: RetrievalQuery natural language vs EmbeddingVector numeric representation; HyDE hypothetical doc is query-expansion intermediate not final query.
boundary.ja: RetrievalQuery 自然言語 vs EmbeddingVector。HyDE 仮説 doc は query expansion 中間産物。

instance.zh: Generative Agents retrieval：query="What is Sam's opinion on art?" → score=α·recency+β·importance+γ·relevance 排序 top-k memories。
instance.en: Generative Agents retrieval: query="What is Sam's opinion on art?" → score=α·recency+β·importance+γ·relevance ranks top-k memories.
instance.ja: Generative Agents query→score=α·recency+β·importance+γ·relevance top-k rank。

positive.zh: Generative Agents：score=α·recency+β·importance+γ·relevance 加权检索；ColBERT MaxSim：Σ_i max_j E_qi·E_dj 晚期 token 交互分数。
positive.en: Generative Agents: score=α·recency+β·importance+γ·relevance weighted retrieval; ColBERT MaxSim: Σ_i max_j E_qi·E_dj late token-interaction score.
positive.ja: Generative Agents score 公式。ColBERT MaxSim Σ_i max_j E_qi·E_dj。

counterexample.zh: 反例：Pinecone cosine similarity 未分解 recency/importance/relevance 分量就标为 Generative Agents RetrievalScore。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: Pinecone cosine similarity labeled Generative Agents RetrievalScore without recency/importance/relevance decomposition.
counterexample.ja: 反例：Pinecone cosine を Generative Agents RetrievalScore とするが成分分解なし。

boundary.zh: SimilarityScore（dense cosine）vs LexicalScore（BM25）vs ColBERT MaxSim（late interaction）不同分数空间；Anthropic Contextual Retrieval rerank 是第三层。
boundary.en: SimilarityScore vs LexicalScore vs ColBERT MaxSim distinct score spaces; Anthropic Contextual Retrieval rerank is third layer.
boundary.ja: SimilarityScore vs LexicalScore vs ColBERT MaxSim 異なる score space。

instance.zh: ColBERT index.search(query, k=10) 返回 MaxSim 分数；Weaviate hybrid alpha=0.5 融合 vector distance 与 BM25 score。
instance.en: ColBERT index.search(k=10) returns MaxSim scores; Weaviate hybrid alpha=0.5 fuses vector distance and BM25 score.
instance.ja: ColBERT MaxSim。Weaviate hybrid alpha=0.5。

positive.zh: Pinecone index.query 返回 cosine similarity match score；pgvector SELECT ORDER BY embedding <=> query LIMIT 5 的 <=> 距离；ColBERT MaxSim 作为 multi-vector similarity。
positive.en: Pinecone index.query returns cosine similarity match score; pgvector SELECT ORDER BY embedding <=> query LIMIT 5 distance; ColBERT MaxSim as multi-vector similarity.
positive.ja: Pinecone cosine match score。pgvector <=> 距離。ColBERT MaxSim multi-vector similarity。

counterexample.zh: 反例：BM25 lexical score 标为 SimilarityScore 而非 LexicalScore。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: BM25 lexical score labeled SimilarityScore instead of LexicalScore.
counterexample.ja: 反例：BM25 lexical score を SimilarityScore と誤ラベル。

boundary.zh: Dense cosine SimilarityScore vs ColBERT token-level MaxSim vs sparse dot-product 不同度量边界。
boundary.en: Dense cosine SimilarityScore vs ColBERT token-level MaxSim vs sparse dot-product metric boundary.
boundary.ja: Dense cosine vs ColBERT MaxSim vs sparse dot-product metric 境界。

instance.zh: Qdrant search(query_vector=[...], limit=10) 返回 score 按 cosine；OpenAI embedding cosine 1536-dim 向量对。
instance.en: Qdrant search(limit=10) returns cosine score; OpenAI embedding cosine 1536-dim vector pair.
instance.ja: Qdrant search cosine score。OpenAI embedding 1536-dim cosine。

positive.zh: Lewis RAG：检索文档 z 组装进 prompt p(y|x,z)；MemGPT main_context 合并 recall_memory 检索结果；Lost in the Middle：关键信息放 context 首尾。
positive.en: Lewis RAG: retrieved docs z assembled into prompt p(y|x,z); MemGPT main_context merges recall_memory results; Lost in the Middle: key info at context head/tail.
positive.ja: Lewis RAG p(y|x,z) assembly。MemGPT main_context merge recall。Lost in the Middle 首尾配置。

counterexample.zh: 反例：未 trim 就把完整 MessageHistory 发送，违反 Lost in the Middle (Liu et al. 2023) U 型注意力曲线治理。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: sending full MessageHistory without trim, violating Lost in the Middle (Liu et al. 2023) U-shaped attention curve governance.
counterexample.ja: 反例：trim なし MessageHistory 全量送信。Lost in the Middle U 型 curve 違反。

boundary.zh: ContextAssembly 调用前定稿包 vs 模型实际 attention；Cursor @Files 引用 vs Claude prompt caching cache_control:{type:ephemeral} 边界。
boundary.en: ContextAssembly pre-call finalized package vs model actual attention; Cursor @Files citation vs Claude prompt caching cache_control:{type:ephemeral} boundary.
boundary.ja: ContextAssembly 確定 package vs model attention。Cursor @Files vs Claude prompt caching 境界。

instance.zh: Cursor @file src/auth.ts + codebase indexing 自动裁剪；Claude 200K window + cache_control:{"type":"ephemeral"} 缓存 system prompt 后 assembly。
instance.en: Cursor @file src/auth.ts + codebase indexing auto-trim; Claude 200K window + cache_control:{"type":"ephemeral"} caches system prompt then assembly.
instance.ja: Cursor @file + codebase indexing auto-trim。Claude 200K + cache_control ephemeral。

positive.zh: Claude 200K token window 分配 input/output reserve；Lost in the Middle 启示：高 priority 内容占首尾 token slot；MemGPT main_context token 上限触发 archival overflow。
positive.en: Claude 200K token window allocates input/output reserve; Lost in the Middle: high-priority content in head/tail token slots; MemGPT main_context token limit triggers archival overflow.
positive.ja: Claude 200K input/output reserve。Lost in the Middle 首尾 slot。MemGPT main_context overflow→archival。

counterexample.zh: 反例：ContextBudget max_tokens=200000 但无 output_reserve 导致 generation 截断。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: ContextBudget max_tokens=200000 without output_reserve causing generation truncation.
counterexample.ja: 反例：max_tokens=200000 だが output_reserve なし generation 截断。

boundary.zh: ContextBudget 计划分配 vs VisibleContextWindow 实际投影；Anthropic prompt caching 缓存 token 不计入 mutable budget。
boundary.en: ContextBudget planned allocation vs VisibleContextWindow actual projection; Anthropic prompt caching cached tokens excluded from mutable budget.
boundary.ja: ContextBudget 計画 vs VisibleContextWindow 実投影。prompt caching token は mutable budget 外。

instance.zh: Cursor context 裁剪：max_context_tokens=128k 保留最近文件引用 + 摘要中间历史；Claude API max_tokens=4096 output reserve。
instance.en: Cursor context trim: max_context_tokens=128k keeps recent file refs + summarized middle history; Claude API max_tokens=4096 output reserve.
instance.ja: Cursor max_context_tokens=128k trim。Claude max_tokens=4096 output reserve。

positive.zh: Claude 200K context window；MemGPT main_context 工作记忆窗口；Lost in the Middle：LLM 对中间位置信息利用率显著下降（U 型曲线）。
positive.en: Claude 200K context window; MemGPT main_context working-memory window; Lost in the Middle: LLM utilization drops for middle-position info (U-curve).
positive.ja: Claude 200K context window。MemGPT main_context。Lost in the Middle U 型 curve。

counterexample.zh: 反例：ContextWindow max_tokens 未绑定具体 model window（如 Claude 200K vs GPT-4 128K）。
counterexample.en: Counterexample: ContextWindow max_tokens not bound to concrete model window (Claude 200K vs GPT-4 128K).
counterexample.ja: 反例：max_tokens が具体 model window に未绑定。

boundary.zh: ContextWindow 容量声明 vs ContextPackage 实际内容；Cursor 部分读取长文件不等于完整 file window。
boundary.en: ContextWindow capacity declaration vs ContextPackage actual content; Cursor partial long-file read is not full file window.
